sales_contracts.purpose: Operational revenue contracts only. Investor capital is never stored here.

invoices.purpose: Recognized and collected operating revenue by fiscal period.

opex_expenses.purpose: Daily operating expenses such as AI subscriptions, recurring ads, automation tools and consumables.

fixed_assets.purpose: High-value technology infrastructure such as laptops, screens and professional audio gear.

liabilities.purpose: Debt opened by credit cards, personal loans or financing used for fixed assets.

liability_payments.purpose: Debt amortization schedule. Principal reduces liability; interest affects operating result.

capital_fund_transactions.purpose: Isolated founder, angel or venture capital movements. Excluded from total sales.

marketing_campaigns.purpose: Manual or automated ROI tracking by channel.

social_metrics.purpose: Organic growth and engagement per social network.

computedMetrics.runwayMonths: IF freeCashFlow < 0 THEN capitalFundAvailable / ABS(freeCashFlow) ELSE healthy/positive runway

accountingRules.name: Financed CAPEX
accountingRules.rule: A financed asset is recorded at full value in fixed_assets and simultaneously creates a liabilities row. Monthly payments split principal and interest. Principal reduces outstanding_balance; interest is the only portion counted as OPEX.

accountingRules.name: External investment isolation
accountingRules.rule: Founder, angel and VC capital is stored only in capital_fund_transactions. It must not be joined into totalSales or operating revenue.
